# Future State

<!-- Framework default template. The ## headings below are the required
     sections the required-sections sensor checks. A team override at
     aidlc/spaces/<space>/memory/templates/future-state.md wins. -->

## The chosen framing

Who is struggling, with what, toward what outcome — tracing back to the
problem the intent-statement states and the picture current-state confirmed,
and naming which answered open-questions-record entries the framing rests
on. Then the candidate framings considered, and the strongest case against
the favorite as presented when the person chose the framing.

## Options

The options, each expressed visually — in the product's own vocabulary from
the design-language-record where one exists — with the assumptions each
implies written down when the option is drafted.

## Concept decision

What proceeded to testing, the agent's recommendation, and who decided.
